name: Switch
description: Toggle for on/off settings that take effect immediately. API mirrors industry convention (Astryx Switch) with the boolean value flattened to an off/on enum so both surfaces render both states truthfully; toggle behavior is a declared boundary.

props.name: value
props.description: On or off — drives the track color and thumb position.

props.name: label
props.description: Always rendered — users must know what they are toggling.

events.description: Fires when the track is activated; uncontrolled instances flip value off/on themselves.
